Hello memory agent, you are continuing to observe the primary Claude session.

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <user_request>開始實作</user_request>
  <requested_at>2026-07-03</requested_at>
</observed_from_primary_session>

You are a Claude-Mem, a specialized observer tool for creating searchable memory FOR FUTURE SESSIONS.

CRITICAL: Record what was LEARNED/BUILT/FIXED/DEPLOYED/CONFIGURED, not what you (the observer) are doing.

You do not have access to tools. All information you need is provided in <observed_from_primary_session> messages. Create observations from what you observe - no investigation needed.

Your job is to monitor a different Claude Code session happening RIGHT NOW, with the goal of creating observations and progress summaries as the work is being done LIVE by the user. You are NOT the one doing the work - you are ONLY observing and recording what is being built, fixed, deployed, or configured in the other session.

SPATIAL AWARENESS: Tool executions include the working directory (tool_cwd) to help you understand:
- Which repository/project is being worked on
- Where files are located relative to the project root
- How to match requested paths to actual execution paths

WHAT TO RECORD
--------------
Focus on deliverables and capabilities:
- What the system NOW DOES differently (new capabilities)
- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)
- Changes in technical domains (auth, data, UI, infra, DevOps, docs)

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored

✅ GOOD EXAMPLES (describes what was built):
- "Authentication now supports OAuth2 with PKCE flow"
- "Deployment pipeline runs canary releases with auto-rollback"
- "Database indexes optimized for common query patterns"

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):
- "Analyzed authentication implementation and stored findings"
- "Tracked deployment steps and logged outcomes"
- "Monitored database performance and recorded metrics"

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks
- Package installations with no errors
- Simple file listings
- Repetitive operations you've already documented
- If file related research comes back as empty or not found
- **No output necessary if skipping.**

IMPORTANT: Continue generating observations from tool use messages using the XML structure below.

OUTPUT FORMAT
-------------
Output observations using this XML structure:

```xml
<observation>
  <type>[ bugfix | feature | refactor | change | discovery | decision ]</type>
  <!--
    **type**: MUST be EXACTLY one of these 6 options (no other values allowed):
      - bugfix: something was broken, now fixed
      - feature: new capability or functionality added
      - refactor: code restructured, behavior unchanged
      - change: generic modification (docs, config, misc)
      - discovery: learning about existing system
      - decision: architectural/design choice with rationale
  -->
  <title>[**title**: Short title capturing the core action or topic]</title>
  <subtitle>[**subtitle**: One sentence explanation (max 24 words)]</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
  </facts>
  <!--
    **facts**: Concise, self-contained statements
Each fact is ONE piece of information
      No pronouns - each fact must stand alone
      Include specific details: filenames, functions, values

**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)
  -->
  <narrative>[**narrative**: Full context: What was done, how it works, why it matters]</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
  </concepts>
  <!--
    **concepts**: 2-5 knowledge-type categories. MUST use ONLY these exact keywords:
      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes
      - gotcha: traps or edge cases
      - pattern: reusable approach
      - trade-off: pros/cons of a decision

    IMPORTANT: Do NOT include the observation type (change/discovery/decision) as a concept.
    Types and concepts are separate dimensions.
  -->
  <files_read>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>
```


IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this OBSERVATIONS from tool use messages - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the observation content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful observations.

Remember that we record these observations as a way of helping us stay on track with our progress, and to help us keep important decisions and changes at the forefront of our minds! :) Thank you so much for your help!

MEMORY PROCESSING CONTINUED
===========================

PROGRESS SUMMARY CHECKPOINT
===========================
Write progress notes of what was done, what was learned, and what's next. This is a checkpoint to capture progress so far. The session is ongoing - you may receive more requests and tool executions after this summary. Write "next_steps" as the current trajectory of work (what's actively being worked on or coming up next), not as post-session future work. Always write at least a minimal summary explaining current progress, even if work is still in early stages, so that users see a summary output tied to each request.

Claude's Full Response to User:
（等你回覆的空檔，我先用最合理的預設把方案定案，**尚未動手改碼**，等你確認再實作。）

## 定案方案（best-judgment 預設）

依你原話點名 `SlotReels.TriggerDropOut()`，且 unshow 一致化較簡單，我採用：
- **Dispatch 點：`SlotReels.TriggerDropOut()` 內**（精準綁在掉出動畫觸發點）
- **Unshow：一併早退場**（與正常 spin 一致）

### 具體改動（3 檔，皆專案層，不碰公版）

**1. `WantedPosterManager.ts`** — 新增退場事件
- `WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT` 加 `PLAY_OUT_ALL`，並加入 `EVENTS_TO_REGISTER`
- `OnEvent` 加 case → 新 handler `HandlePlayOutAll()`：
  - `NormalizeGhosts()` 先清 ghost
  - 對所有 `node.active` 的 item：`PlayOut().then(() => active=false)`
  - 同步清 `m_currentBounty[i]=null`、`item.ClearBaseSymbol()`
  - fire-and-forget（不回 resolve，不阻斷掉出節奏）

**2. `SlotReels.ts`** — 在 `TriggerDropOut()` 冪等檢查通過後，dispatch `PLAY_OUT_ALL`
- 放在 `if (this.m_dropAllSymbolsOutOfScreenPromise) return;` 之後，確保跟掉出動畫**同一次**觸發、且冪等（同局不重複退場）

**3. `RebuildAll` 不動** — 稍後 `SetNowRoundInfo` 跑到時懸賞令已 `active=false`，PlayOut 迴圈自然 no-op，只跑新的 PlayIn。非 spin 路徑（連線初始 / LeaveFree 清空）無 dropout、不發此事件，行為完全不變。

### 需注意的一個風險（會在實作時處理）

早退場的 `PlayOut` 動畫時長若 **> 舊盤掉出(1.5s) + 大獎預告**，`RebuildAll` 跑到時 item 可能還 `active=true` → 會被再 PlayOut 一次（雙重退場）。實務上退場動畫通常遠短於 1.5s，風險低；我會在 handler 用旗標/或讓 RebuildAll 的 PlayOut 對「正在退場中」的 item 也 no-op 來保險。

---

要我**照此定案開始實作**嗎？或你回上面兩個選擇後我再調整（特別是 dispatch 點想改放 `GameView.StartSpin` 的話）。

Respond in this XML format:
<summary>
  <request>[Short title capturing the user's request AND the substance of what was discussed/done]</request>
  <investigated>[What has been explored so far? What was examined?]</investigated>
  <learned>[What have you learned about how things work?]</learned>
  <completed>[What work has been completed so far? What has shipped or changed?]</completed>
  <next_steps>[What are you actively working on or planning to work on next in this session?]</next_steps>
  <notes>[Additional insights or observations about the current progress]</notes>
</summary>

IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this next PROGRESS SUMMARY - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the summary content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful summary content.

Thank you, this summary will be very useful for keeping track of our progress!

attachment.content:
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- dataviz: Use this skill whenever you are about to create ANY chart, graph, plot, dashboard, or data visualization, in ANY output medium — an HTML or React artifact, inline SVG, plotting code in any library (matplotlib, plotly, d3, Recharts, …), an image/PNG you will render and upload, or a chart shared into Slack. Read it BEFORE writing the first line of chart code, choosing chart colors, building a stat tile / meter / KPI row, or laying out a dashboard. Produces visualizations that read as one system — elegant, accessible, consistent in light and dark — using a brand-neutral placeholder palette you swap for your own. Teaches a design-system-agnostic method: a form heuristic, a color formula with a runnable validator, mark specs, and interaction rules. A validated default palette is documented in `references/palette.md` — swap that file's values for your brand's. Triggers on: "chart", "graph", "plot", "data viz", "visualization", "dashboard", "analytics", "visualize data", "categorical colors", "sequential / diverging palette", "stat tile", "sparkline", "heatmap", "legend", "axis", "tooltip", "chart colors", "color by series".
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by exercising it end-to-end and observing behavior — drive the affected flow, not just tests or typecheck. Run before committing nontrivial changes. Don't invoke it on a diff that only touches tests, docs, or other code with no runtime surface to drive (a change to product source always has one) — there's nothing to observe.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled cloud agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring cloud agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a GitHub pull request; for your working diff use /code-review
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

<summary>
  <request>User requested to start implementation of wanted poster exit animation synchronization with slot reel drop-out</request>
  <investigated>Analyzed timing and architecture for synchronizing wanted poster (懸賞令) exit animations with slot reel drop-out animations. Evaluated two dispatch point options: SlotReels.TriggerDropOut() vs GameView.StartSpin, and two unshow strategies (early vs late exit).</investigated>
  <learned>Current system has separate animation lifecycles for wanted posters and slot reels. SlotReels.TriggerDropOut() is the precise trigger point for drop-out animation (1.5s duration). WantedPosterManager handles poster visibility through PlayIn/PlayOut methods. RebuildAll in SetNowRoundInfo handles poster rebuilding and would naturally skip inactive posters. Early exit (unshow) approach maintains consistency with normal spin behavior and is simpler to implement.</learned>
  <completed>Solution design finalized with specific implementation plan: (1) Add PLAY_OUT_ALL event to WantedPosterManager.ts with HandlePlayOutAll() handler that normalizes ghosts and triggers PlayOut for all active posters, (2) Dispatch event from SlotReels.TriggerDropOut() after idempotency check, (3) Identified potential risk of double-exit if PlayOut animation duration exceeds dropout timing, with mitigation strategy noted. Three files identified for modification: WantedPosterManager.ts, SlotReels.ts, and RebuildAll behavior analysis. All changes scoped to project layer only, no base library modifications.</completed>
  <next_steps>Awaiting user confirmation to proceed with implementation of the finalized solution. Once confirmed, will implement the 3-file changes with attention to the double-exit risk mitigation.</next_steps>
  <notes>Implementation has been deliberately paused pending user approval of the proposed approach. Claude noted this is a "best-judgment default" based on user's original mention of SlotReels.TriggerDropOut() and preference for unified unshow behavior. User still has option to adjust dispatch point (to GameView.StartSpin) before implementation begins.</notes>
</summary>
```

    <fact>SlotReels.ts imports eventManager from astarte-framework and uses Dispatch for cross-module events like FAKE_REEL_MANAGER_EVENT</fact>

  <narrative>Investigation of WantedPosterItem animation API confirmed the available methods for implementing synchronized poster exit. The PlayOut() method provides the promise-based animation interface needed for the HandlePlayOutAll handler. ClearBaseSymbol() is designed to be called during ghost transitions to prevent dirty symbol data. SlotReels.ts already uses eventManager.Dispatch pattern for cross-module communication with FakeReelManager, confirming the event dispatch approach is consistent with existing architecture. WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.SET_WANTED_POSTER_UI_SHOW,\\n        WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.PLAY_MARK,\\n        WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE,\\n        WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.GAME_INTRO_COMPLETE,\\n        GAME_EVENT.DEVICE_ROTATION,\\n    ];\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch GAME_INTRO_COMPLETE 顯示懸賞令的延遲（秒）\\n     * 補 intro spine 的 Wanted_On 幀事件偏早約 0.15 秒（暫時方案，待能改 spine 原檔後移除）\\n     */\\n    private static readonly GAME_INTRO_SHOW_DELAY = 0.15;\\n    //#endregion Constants\\n\\n    //#region Properties\\n    @property({\\n        type: Node,\\n        tooltip: \\\"根節點\\\"\\n    })\\n    private m_rootNode: Node = null;\\n\\n    @property({\\n        type: [WantedPosterItem],\\n        tooltip: \\\"懸賞令物品\\\"\\n    })\\n    private m_wantedPosterItems: WantedPosterItem[] = [];\\n\\n    @property({\\n        type: Layout,\\n        tooltip: \\\"懸賞令排版元件（m_wantedPosterItems 父節點上的 cc.Layout）\\\"\\n    })\\n    private m_layout: Layout = null;\\n\\n    @property({\\n        type: WantedPosterLayoutConfig,\\n        tooltip: \\\"直向排版設定\\\"\\n    })\\n    private m_portraitConfig: WantedPosterLayoutConfig = new WantedPosterLayoutConfig();\\n\\n    @property({\\n        type: WantedPosterLayoutConfig,\\n        tooltip: \\\"橫向排版設定\\\"\\n    })\\n    private m_landscapeConfig: WantedPosterLayoutConfig = new WantedPosterLayoutConfig();\\n    //#endregion Properties\\n\\n    //#region Variables\\n    /**@ch 是否已初始化*/\\n    private m_isInitialized: boolean = false;\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 各 item 目前綁定的懸賞令資料（null = 該 item 未顯示）\\n     * 與 m_wantedPosterItems 同索引，是「同 BaseSymbol 持續判斷」與「倍率是否變」的真實依據\\n     * （item 本身只記 BaseSymbol、不記 Multiple，故由 Manager 統一追蹤）\\n     */\\n    private m_currentBounty: (IBountyData | null)[] = [];\\n    //#endregion Variables\\n\\n    //#region Lifecycle\\n    /**@ch 元件載入時調用*/\\n    onLoad() {\\n        this.RegisterEvent();\\n        this.RegisterKeyboardEvents();\\n        this.EnsureCurrentBountySize();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 元件啟動時調用（GameView 已就緒，套用初始方向 Layout）*/\\n    start() {\\n        this.ApplyLayoutByOrientation();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 元件銷毀時調用*/\\n    onDestroy() {\\n        if (!this.m_isInitialized) return;\\n        this.UnregisterEvent();\\n        this.UnregisterKeyboardEvents();\\n        this.m_isInitialized = false;\\n    }\\n    //#endregion Lifecycle\\n\\n    //#region Event Management\\n    /**@ch 註冊鍵盤事件（測試用）*/\\n    private RegisterKeyboardEvents(): void {\\n        if (!DEBUG) return;\\n        // input.on(Input.EventType.KEY_DOWN, this.CheckTestKeyCode, this);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 取消註冊鍵盤事件（測試用）*/\\n    private UnregisterKeyboardEvents(): void {\\n        if (!DEBUG) return;\\n        // input.off(Input.EventType.KEY_DOWN, this.CheckTestKeyCode, this);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 註冊事件*/\\n    private RegisterEvent() {\\n        WantedPosterManager.EVENTS_TO_REGISTER.forEach(eventName => {\\n            eventManager.Register(eventName, this);\\n        });\\n        this.m_isInitialized = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 取消註冊事件*/\\n    private UnregisterEvent() {\\n        WantedPosterManager.EVENTS_TO_REGISTER.forEach(eventName => {\\n            eventManager.UnRegister(eventName, this);\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 驗證 SET_WANTED_POSTER_UI_SHOW 事件參數\\n     * @param args 事件參數\\n     * @returns 是否有效\\n     */\\n    private ValidateSetWantedPosterUIShowArgs(args: any[]): boolean {\\n        if (typeof args[0] !== 'boolean') {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] SET_WANTED_POSTER_UI_SHOW: 無效的參數', args[0]);\\n            return false;\\n        }\\n        return true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 驗證 SET_WANTED_POSTER_DATA 事件參數\\n     * @param args 事件參數\\n     * @returns 是否有效\\n     */\\n    private ValidateSetWantedPosterDataArgs(args: any[]): boolean {\\n        if (!Array.isArray(args[0])) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] SET_WANTED_POSTER_DATA: 無效的資料參數', args[0]);\\n            return false;\\n        }\\n        return true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 事件回調\\n     * @param event 事件名稱\\n     * @param args 事件參數\\n     */\\n    OnEvent(event: string, ...args: any[]) {\\n        switch (event) {\\n            case WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.SET_WANTED_POSTER_DATA:\\n                if (this.ValidateSetWantedPosterDataArgs(args)) {\\n                    this.SetWantedPosterData(\\n                        args[0] as IBountyData[],\\n                        args[1] === true,\\n                        Array.isArray(args[2]) ? args[2] as number[] : undefined\\n                    );\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.SET_WANTED_POSTER_UI_SHOW:\\n                if (this.ValidateSetWantedPosterUIShowArgs(args)) {\\n                    this.SetWantedPosterUIShow(args[0] as boolean);\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.PLAY_MARK:\\n                this.HandlePlayMark(args[0] as number, args[1] as () => void);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE:\\n                this.HandlePlayMarkActive(args[0] as number, args[1] as () => void);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.GAME_INTRO_COMPLETE:\\n                this.HandleGameIntroComplete();\\n                break;\\n\\n            case GAME_EVENT.DEVICE_ROTATION:\\n                this.ApplyLayoutByOrientation();\\n                break;\\n\\n            default:\\n                warn('[WantedPosterManager] OnEvent: 未知的事件', event);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依目前裝置方向套用對應的 Layout 設定\\n     * 由 start() 與 GAME_EVENT.DEVICE_ROTATION 事件觸發\\n     */\\n    private ApplyLayoutByOrientation(): void {\\n        if (!this.m_layout) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] ApplyLayoutByOrientation: m_layout 未設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const isLandscape = Common.GetGameView().IsLandscape;\\n        const cfg = isLandscape ? this.m_landscapeConfig : this.m_portraitConfig;\\n\\n        this.m_layout.type = cfg.type;\\n        this.m_layout.resizeMode = cfg.resizeMode;\\n        this.m_layout.paddingLeft = cfg.paddingLeft;\\n        this.m_layout.paddingRight = cfg.paddingRight;\\n        this.m_layout.paddingTop = cfg.paddingTop;\\n        this.m_layout.paddingBottom = cfg.paddingBottom;\\n        this.m_layout.spacingX = cfg.spacingX;\\n        this.m_layout.spacingY = cfg.spacingY;\\n        this.m_layout.alignHorizontal = cfg.alignHorizontal;\\n        this.m_layout.alignVertical = cfg.alignVertical;\\n        this.m_layout.updateLayout();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理 PLAY_MARK 事件\\n     * BC-4：對該 BaseSymbol 的所有相符常駐 item 同時播 Mark，全部完成才 resolve\\n     *       （找到 N 個就播 N 個；N=0 才視為 EH-1，0<N 屬可接受降級不 warn）\\n     * EH-1：找不到任何對應 item（空陣列）→ warn + 立刻 resolve（不阻斷上游流程）\\n     * EH-9：resolve callback 缺失 → error（caller bug）\\n     */\\n    private HandlePlayMark(baseSymbol: number, resolve: () => void) {\\n        if (typeof resolve !== 'function') {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] PLAY_MARK: resolve callback 缺失');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const items = this.GetItemsByBaseSymbol(baseSymbol);\\n        if (items.length === 0) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] PLAY_MARK: 找不到對應 item, baseSymbol=', baseSymbol);\\n            resolve();\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        Promise.all(items.map(item => item.PlayMark())).then(() => resolve());\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理 PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE 事件\\n     * BC-6：對該 BaseSymbol 的所有相符 item 同時播 Mark_Active 並各自 active=false\\n     * EH-1：找不到任何對應 item（空陣列）→ warn + 立刻 resolve\\n     * EH-9：resolve callback 缺失 → error\\n     */\\n    private HandlePlayMarkActive(baseSymbol: number, resolve: () => void) {\\n        if (typeof resolve !== 'function') {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE: resolve callback 缺失');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const items = this.GetItemsByBaseSymbol(baseSymbol);\\n        if (items.length === 0) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE: 找不到對應 item, baseSymbol=', baseSymbol);\\n            resolve();\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ── 同步段（Promise.all 之前）：先清本批綁定。並行的其他 dispatch（WantedPosterState 跨 group）\\n        //    也各自同步清，故動畫完成時的 ghost 判定能看到「本波所有離場者皆已退」（§5.5 race 修正）\\n        for (const item of items) {\\n            const idx = this.m_wantedPosterItems.indexOf(item);\\n            if (idx >= 0) this.m_currentBounty[idx] = null;\\n            item.ClearBaseSymbol();\\n        }\\n        // ── 非同步段：動畫播完才切換視覺。判定移到 .then（此時全波同步段已執行完）：\\n        //    仍有 real（survivor 留場）→ 轉 ghost 撐位讓 survivor 不 snap；否則真消失（BC-G6）\\n        Promise.all(items.map(item =>\\n            item.PlayMarkActive().then(() => {\\n                if (this.m_currentBounty.some(b => b !== null)) item.SetContentVisible(false);\\n                else item.node.active = false;\\n            })\\n        )).then(() => {\\n            // 本波後若全場無 real → 釋放殘留 ghost（避免上一輪保留的 ghost 隱形殘留 · §5.3.1）\\n            if (!this.m_currentBounty.some(b => b !== null)) this.NormalizeGhosts();\\n            resolve();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理 GAME_INTRO_COMPLETE 事件\\n     * 遊戲介紹完成後顯示 1 個懸賞令（M1、倍率 9999）為「已定位」靜止畫面（不播 In 進場）。\\n     * 前提：呼叫時場上保證為空（開場第一次顯示），故直接設定 item[0]、不需清場。\\n     * Multiple=9999 ≥ Multiplier_Max → item 內部走 m_x9999Node 顯示分支。\\n     */\\n    private HandleGameIntroComplete() {\\n        // Wanted_On 幀事件偏早 + 改走 ShowInSettled（瞬間定位、不播進場）少了原進場的時間差 → 懸賞令早出現約 0.15 秒。\\n        // ⚠️ 暫時方案：時序真相本應落在 spine 的 Wanted_On keyframe；待能改 spine 原檔後移除此延遲。\\n        // 延遲綁在 WantedPosterManager（持久 UI 管理器，node 全程 active），而非 sender GameIntroManager\\n        //（其 node 於 intro 結束 active=false，scheduleOnce 會被取消導致懸賞令不顯示）。\\n        this.scheduleOnce(() => this.ShowGameIntroPoster(), WantedPosterManager.GAME_INTRO_SHOW_DELAY);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 實際顯示 GAME_INTRO_COMPLETE 懸賞令 x9999（由 HandleGameIntroComplete 延遲呼叫）\\n     * 前提：呼叫時場上保證為空（開場第一次顯示），故直接設定 item[0]、不需清場。\\n     * Multiple=9999 ≥ Multiplier_Max → item 內部走 m_x9999Node 顯示分支。\\n     */\\n    private ShowGameIntroPoster() {\\n        this.EnsureCurrentBountySize();\\n        this.NormalizeGhosts();   // 防禦：0→1 前確保無殘留 ghost（正常此路徑場上為空）\\n        const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[0];\\n        if (!item) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] GAME_INTRO_COMPLETE: 懸賞令物品[0] 未設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const data: IBountyData = { BaseSymbol: Symbol.M1, BountySymbol: 0, Multiple: 9999, MultipleIndex: 0 };\\n        // 先 active 再 setSkin：inactive 狀態下 setSkin 不會重建已渲染骨架的 render data（殘留舊 skin）\\n        item.node.active = true;\\n        item.SetWantedPosterData(data);\\n        item.ShowInSettled();           // 直接顯示 In 定位完成的靜止畫面（不播進場）\\n        this.m_currentBounty[0] = data;\\n    }\\n    //#endregion Event Management\\n\\n    //#region Methods\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置懸賞令資料（以 BaseSymbol multiset 比對前後狀態 — 決定 進場 / 退場 / 退場再進場 / 持續）\\n     *\\n     * 比對規則（內容式，計數 multiset；每個 BaseSymbol 綁定一個 item，持續者保留原綁定）：\\n     * - BC-20 isNewRound=true（新一局）→ 現有全部退場、新清單全部進場（整批重建）\\n     * - BC-21 同局・新增 BaseSymbol（計數增加）→ 進場（SetData + active + PlayIn）\\n     * - BC-22 同局・移除 BaseSymbol（計數減少）→ 退場（PlayOut → active=false）\\n     * - BC-23 同局・同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 變 → 原 item 退場再進場（PlayOut → SetData → PlayIn）\\n     * - BC-24 同局・同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 同・盤面(扣除被消除位置)已無此符號 → 原 item 退場再進場\\n     * - BC-25 同局・同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 同・盤面仍可見 → 持續，不播動畫\\n     * 位置重排一律交由 cc.Layout（本元件只處理 In/Out 動畫，不碰節點位置）。\\n     *\\n     * @param dataList 本輪懸賞令資料（Multiple>0 才顯示）\\n     * @param isNewRound 是否新一局（強制整批重建）；省略視為同局 cascade\\n     * @param visibleBaseSymbols 盤面(扣除被消除位置)目前可見的 BaseSymbol；僅 cascade 需傳，省略視為全可見\\n     */\\n    private SetWantedPosterData(dataList: IBountyData[], isNewRound: boolean = false, visibleBaseSymbols?: number[]) {\\n        if (!this.m_wantedPosterItems || this.m_wantedPosterItems.length === 0) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] SetWantedPosterData: 懸賞令物品未設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.EnsureCurrentBountySize();\\n\\n        const count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n        // 本輪要顯示的 bounty（Multiple>0 且 BaseSymbol 非 Wanted_Empty 佔位），超量截斷至 item 數量上限\\n        // BaseSymbol === Wanted_Empty 視同空資料（懸賞海報空位），一併排除不顯示\\n        const newBounties = dataList.filter(d => d && d.Multiple > 0 && d.BaseSymbol !== Symbol.Wanted_Empty);\\n        if (newBounties.length > count) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] SetWantedPosterData: 資料數量超過物品數量',\\n                newBounties.length, '>', count);\\n            newBounties.length = count;\\n        }\\n\\n        if (isNewRound) {\\n            this.RebuildAll(newBounties);\\n        } else {\\n            this.ReconcileCascade(newBounties, visibleBaseSymbols);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch BC-20 整批重建（新一局）：現有全部 Out 並關閉，全部 Out 完成後新清單依序設資料、active、PlayIn。\\n     *     先 Out 再一起 In，避免新舊同時在場造成 Layout 重排跳動。\\n     *     綁定同步記錄為目標狀態（視覺在 Out 完成後才 In）。\\n     */\\n    private RebuildAll(newBounties: IBountyData[]) {\\n        // 整批重建前先釋放殘留 ghost：使下方以 node.active 判退場的迴圈不被 ghost（active 但隱形）干擾（BC-G4 · D5）\\n        this.NormalizeGhosts();\\n        const count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n\\n        const outPromises: Promise<void>[] = [];\\n        for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {\\n            const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n            if (item && item.node.active) {\\n                outPromises.push(item.PlayOut().then(() => { item.node.active = false; }));\\n            }\\n            // 同步記錄目標綁定（前 newBounties.length 個為新資料，其餘清空）\\n            this.m_currentBounty[i] = i < newBounties.length ? newBounties[i] : null;\\n        }\\n\\n        const enterAll = () => {\\n            for (let i = 0; i < newBounties.length; i++) {\\n                const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n                if (!item) continue;\\n                // 先 active 再 ShowContent 再 setSkin：inactive/Content off 時 setSkin 不重建 render data（殘留舊 skin）\\n                item.node.active = true;\\n                item.SetContentVisible(true);\\n                item.SetWantedPosterData(newBounties[i]);\\n                item.PlayIn();\\n            }\\n        };\\n\\n        if (outPromises.length > 0) Promise.all(outPromises).then(enterAll);\\n        else enterAll();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 同局 cascade 對帳：以 BaseSymbol multiset 比對目前綁定 ↔ 新清單，保留持續者的 item 綁定。\\n     *     - 同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 同・盤面仍可見 → 持續（不動）         [BC-25]\\n     *     - 同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 變 或 盤面已無此符號 → 原 item 退場再進場 [BC-23/BC-24]\\n     *     - 多出的新 BaseSymbol → 進場（優先用原本就空的 item；不足才等退場者騰出版位）[BC-21]\\n     *     - 少掉的舊 BaseSymbol → 退場                                  [BC-22]\\n     * @param visibleBaseSymbols 盤面(扣除被消除位置)可見的 BaseSymbol；省略視為全可見\\n     */\\n    private ReconcileCascade(newBounties: IBountyData[], visibleBaseSymbols?: number[]) {\\n        const count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n        const visible = visibleBaseSymbols ? new Set(visibleBaseSymbols) : null;\\n\\n        // 新清單依 BaseSymbol 分組成可消耗的 pool（multiset）\\n        const pool = new Map<number, IBountyData[]>();\\n        for (const b of newBounties) {\\n            const list = pool.get(b.BaseSymbol);\\n            if (list) list.push(b); else pool.set(b.BaseSymbol, [b]);\\n        }\\n\\n        const preFreeSlots: number[] = [];      // 更新前就空著的 item（含 pre-existing ghost），供進場立即 reuse\\n        const vacatingSlots: number[] = [];     // 本輪「真消失」騰出的 item，Out 完才可用\\n        const outPromises: Promise<void>[] = [];\\n        const deferredEnter: IBountyData[] = [];\\n        const leavingSlots: number[] = [];      // BC-22 離場者：ghost vs 真消失待 Pass A 後依 hasSurvivor 決定\\n        let hasSurvivor = false;                // 任一 BC-25 持續者（全程沒播 Out/In）→ 需 ghost 撐位防 snap\\n\\n        // Pass A：逐一決定目前已綁定 item 的命運（BC-22 離場決策延後到收尾）\\n        for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {\\n            const cur = this.m_currentBounty[i];\\n            const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n            if (cur === null) {\\n                if (item) preFreeSlots.push(i);              // 空格或 pre-existing ghost（皆可被新進場 reuse）\\n                continue;\\n            }\\n            const bs = cur.BaseSymbol;\\n            const list = pool.get(bs);\\n            if (list && list.length > 0) {\\n                const onBoard = visible ? visible.has(bs) : true;\\n                // 優先配對「相同 Multiple」以持續（不播動畫）；盤面不可見則一律退場再進場\\n                const sameIdx = onBoard ? list.findIndex(b => b.Multiple === cur.Multiple) : -1;\\n                if (sameIdx >= 0) {\\n                    list.splice(sameIdx, 1);                 // BC-25 持續：消耗一筆，item 不動\\n                    hasSurvivor = true;                      // 連續顯示者，被搬動會被察覺 → 需 ghost 撐位\\n                } else {\\n                    const nb = list.shift()!;                // BC-23/BC-24 退場再進場（有 In 動畫遮蓋，不算 survivor）\\n                    if (item) item.PlayOut().then(() => { item.SetWantedPosterData(nb); item.PlayIn(); });\\n                    this.m_currentBounty[i] = nb;\\n                }\\n                if (list.length === 0) pool.delete(bs);\\n            } else {\\n                leavingSlots.push(i);                        // BC-22 離場：ghost/gone 待收尾決策\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        // Pass A 收尾：依 hasSurvivor 對離場者統一決策（ghost 撐位 vs 真消失）\\n        for (const i of leavingSlots) {\\n            const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n            this.m_currentBounty[i] = null;\\n            if (hasSurvivor) {\\n                // BC-G1 轉 ghost：item root 維持 active 撐住 Layout 版位，讓 BC-25 持續者不 snap\\n                if (item) {\\n                    item.ClearBaseSymbol();\\n                    outPromises.push(item.PlayOut().then(() => { item.SetContentVisible(false); }));\\n                }\\n            } else {\\n                // 真消失：無連續 survivor 需保護\\n                if (item) outPromises.push(item.PlayOut().then(() => { item.node.active = false; }));\\n                vacatingSlots.push(i);\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        // Pass B：pool 剩餘 = 需進場的新 BaseSymbol [BC-21]\\n        const remaining: IBountyData[] = [];\\n        for (const list of pool.values()) remaining.push(...list);\\n        for (const nb of remaining) {\\n            if (preFreeSlots.length > 0) {\\n                this.EnterAt(preFreeSlots.shift()!, nb);     // 有現成空位/pre-existing ghost → 立即 reuse 進場\\n            } else {\\n                deferredEnter.push(nb);                      // 無現成空位 → 等退場者騰出\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        // 收尾：deferredEnter 等退場騰位 + postReal===0 釋放殘留 ghost（§5.3.1）\\n        // NormalizeGhosts 只釋放「active 且綁定 null」者；先 enter 後 this.m_currentBounty[idx] = null;\\n            item.ClearBaseSymbol();\\n        }\\n        // ── 非同步段：動畫播完才切換視覺。判定移到 .then（此時全波同步段已執行完）：\\n        //    仍有 real（survivor 留場）→ 轉 ghost 撐位讓 survivor 不 snap；否則真消失（BC-G6）\\n        Promise.all(items.map(item =>\\n            item.PlayMarkActive().then(() => {\\n                if (this.m_currentBounty.some(b => b !== null)) item.SetContentVisible(false);\\n                else item.node.active = false;\\n            })\\n        )).then(() => {\\n            // 本波後若全場無 real → 釋放殘留 ghost（避免上一輪保留的 ghost 隱形殘留 · §5.3.1）\\n            if (!this.m_currentBounty.some(b => b !== null)) this.NormalizeGhosts();\\n            resolve();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理 GAME_INTRO_COMPLETE 事件\\n     * 遊戲介紹完成後顯示 1 個懸賞令（M1、倍率 9999）為「已定位」靜止畫面（不播 In 進場）。\\n     * 前提：呼叫時場上保證為空（開場第一次顯示），故直接設定 item[0]、不需清場。\\n     * Multiple=9999 ≥ Multiplier_Max → item 內部走 m_x9999Node 顯示分支。\\n     */\\n    private HandleGameIntroComplete() {\\n        // Wanted_On 幀事件偏早 + 改走 ShowInSettled（瞬間定位、不播進場）少了原進場的時間差 → 懸賞令早出現約 0.15 秒。\\n        // ⚠️ 暫時方案：時序真相本應落在 spine 的 Wanted_On keyframe；待能改 spine 原檔後移除此延遲。\\n        // 延遲綁在 WantedPosterManager（持久 UI 管理器，node 全程 active），而非 sender GameIntroManager\\n        //（其 node 於 intro 結束 active=false，scheduleOnce 會被取消導致懸賞令不顯示）。\\n        this.scheduleOnce(() => this.ShowGameIntroPoster(), WantedPosterManager.GAME_INTRO_SHOW_DELAY);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 實際顯示 GAME_INTRO_COMPLETE 懸賞令 x9999（由 HandleGameIntroComplete 延遲呼叫）\\n     * 前提：呼叫時場上保證為空（開場第一次顯示），故直接設定 item[0]、不需清場。\\n     * Multiple=9999 ≥ Multiplier_Max → item 內部走 m_x9999Node 顯示分支。\\n     */\\n    private ShowGameIntroPoster() {\\n        this.EnsureCurrentBountySize();\\n        this.NormalizeGhosts();   // 防禦：0→1 前確保無殘留 ghost（正常此路徑場上為空）\\n        const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[0];\\n        if (!item) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] GAME_INTRO_COMPLETE: 懸賞令物品[0] 未設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const data: IBountyData = { BaseSymbol: Symbol.M1, BountySymbol: 0, Multiple: 9999, MultipleIndex: 0 };\\n        // 先 active 再 setSkin：inactive 狀態下 setSkin 不會重建已渲染骨架的 render data（殘留舊 skin）\\n        item.node.active = true;\\n        item.SetWantedPosterData(data);\\n        item.ShowInSettled();           // 直接顯示 In 定位完成的靜止畫面（不播進場）\\n        this.m_currentBounty[0] = data;\\n    }\\n    //#endregion Event Management\\n\\n    //#region Methods\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置懸賞令資料（以 BaseSymbol multiset 比對前後狀態 — 決定 進場 / 退場 / 退場再進場 / 持續）\\n     *\\n     * 比對規則（內容式，計數 multiset；每個 BaseSymbol 綁定一個 item，持續者保留原綁定）：\\n     * - BC-20 isNewRound=true（新一局）→ 現有全部退場、新清單全部進場（整批重建）\\n     * - BC-21 同局・新增 BaseSymbol（計數增加）→ 進場（SetData + active + PlayIn）\\n     * - BC-22 同局・移除 BaseSymbol（計數減少）→ 退場（PlayOut → active=false）\\n     * - BC-23 同局・同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 變 → 原 item 退場再進場（PlayOut → SetData → PlayIn）\\n     * - BC-24 同局・同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 同・盤面(扣除被消除位置)已無此符號 → 原 item 退場再進場\\n     * - BC-25 同局・同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 同・盤面仍可見 → 持續，不播動畫\\n     * 位置重排一律交由 cc.Layout（本元件只處理 In/Out 動畫，不碰節點位置）。\\n     *\\n     * @param dataList 本輪懸賞令資料（Multiple>0 才顯示）\\n     * @param isNewRound 是否新一局（強制整批重建）；省略視為同局 cascade\\n     * @param visibleBaseSymbols 盤面(扣除被消除位置)目前可見的 BaseSymbol；僅 cascade 需傳，省略視為全可見\\n     */\\n    private SetWantedPosterData(dataList: IBountyData[], isNewRound: boolean = false, visibleBaseSymbols?: number[]) {\\n        if (!this.m_wantedPosterItems || this.m_wantedPosterItems.length === 0) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] SetWantedPosterData: 懸賞令物品未設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.EnsureCurrentBountySize();\\n\\n        const count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n        // 本輪要顯示的 bounty（Multiple>0 且 BaseSymbol 非 Wanted_Empty 佔位），超量截斷至 item 數量上限\\n        // BaseSymbol === Wanted_Empty 視同空資料（懸賞海報空位），一併排除不顯示\\n        const newBounties = dataList.filter(d => d && d.Multiple > 0 && d.BaseSymbol !== Symbol.Wanted_Empty);\\n        if (newBounties.length > count) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] SetWantedPosterData: 資料數量超過物品數量',\\n                newBounties.length, '>', count);\\n            newBounties.length = count;\\n        }\\n\\n        if (isNewRound) {\\n            this.RebuildAll(newBounties);\\n        } else {\\n            this.ReconcileCascade(newBounties, visibleBaseSymbols);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch BC-20 整批重建（新一局）：現有全部 Out 並關閉，全部 Out 完成後新清單依序設資料、active、PlayIn。\\n     *     先 Out 再一起 In，避免新舊同時在場造成 Layout 重排跳動。\\n     *     綁定同步記錄為目標狀態（視覺在 Out 完成後才 In）。\\n     */\\n    private RebuildAll(newBounties: IBountyData[]) {\\n        // 整批重建前先釋放殘留 ghost：使下方以 node.active 判退場的迴圈不被 ghost（active 但隱形）干擾（BC-G4 · D5）\\n        this.NormalizeGhosts();\\n        const count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n\\n        const outPromises: Promise<void>[] = [];\\n        for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {\\n            const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n            if (item && item.node.active) {\\n                outPromises.push(item.PlayOut().then(() => { item.node.active = false; }));\\n            }\\n            // 同步記錄目標綁定（前 newBounties.length 個為新資料，其餘清空）\\n            this.m_currentBounty[i] = i < newBounties.length ? newBounties[i] : null;\\n        }\\n\\n        const enterAll = () => {\\n            for (let i = 0; i < newBounties.length; i++) {\\n                const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n                if (!item) continue;\\n                // 先 active 再 ShowContent 再 setSkin：inactive/Content off 時 setSkin 不重建 render data（殘留舊 skin）\\n                item.node.active = true;\\n                item.SetContentVisible(true);\\n                item.SetWantedPosterData(newBounties[i]);\\n                item.PlayIn();\\n            }\\n        };\\n\\n        if (outPromises.length > 0) Promise.all(outPromises).then(enterAll);\\n        else enterAll();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 同局 cascade 對帳：以 BaseSymbol multiset 比對目前綁定 ↔ 新清單，保留持續者的 item 綁定。\\n     *     - 同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 同・盤面仍可見 → 持續（不動）         [BC-25]\\n     *     - 同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 變 或 盤面已無此符號 → 原 item 退場再進場 [BC-23/BC-24]\\n     *     - 多出的新 BaseSymbol → 進場（優先用原本就空的 item；不足才等退場者騰出版位）[BC-21]\\n     *     - 少掉的舊 BaseSymbol → 退場                                  [BC-22]\\n     * @param visibleBaseSymbols 盤面(扣除被消除位置)可見的 BaseSymbol；省略視為全可見\\n     */\\n    private ReconcileCascade(newBounties: IBountyData[], visibleBaseSymbols?: number[]) {\\n        const count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n        const visible = visibleBaseSymbols ? new Set(visibleBaseSymbols) : null;\\n\\n        // 新清單依 BaseSymbol 分組成可消耗的 pool（multiset）\\n        const pool = new Map<number, IBountyData[]>();\\n        for (const b of newBounties) {\\n            const list = pool.get(b.BaseSymbol);\\n            if (list) list.push(b); else pool.set(b.BaseSymbol, [b]);\\n        }\\n\\n        const preFreeSlots: number[] = [];      // 更新前就空著的 item（含 pre-existing ghost），供進場立即 reuse\\n        const vacatingSlots: number[] = [];     // 本輪「真消失」騰出的 item，Out 完才可用\\n        const outPromises: Promise<void>[] = [];\\n        const deferredEnter: IBountyData[] = [];\\n        const leavingSlots: number[] = [];      // BC-22 離場者：ghost vs 真消失待 Pass A 後依 hasSurvivor 決定\\n        let hasSurvivor = false;                // 任一 BC-25 持續者（全程沒播 Out/In）→ 需 ghost 撐位防 snap\\n\\n        // Pass A：逐一決定目前已綁定 item 的命運（BC-22 離場決策延後到收尾）\\n        for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {\\n            const cur = this.m_currentBounty[i];\\n            const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n            if (cur === null) {\\n                if (item) preFreeSlots.push(i);              // 空格或 pre-existing ghost（皆可被新進場 reuse）\\n                continue;\\n            }\\n            const bs = cur.BaseSymbol;\\n            const list = pool.get(bs);\\n            if (list && list.length > 0) {\\n                const onBoard = visible ? visible.has(bs) : true;\\n                // 優先配對「相同 Multiple」以持續（不播動畫）；盤面不可見則一律退場再進場\\n                const sameIdx = onBoard ? list.findIndex(b => b.Multiple === cur.Multiple) : -1;\\n                if (sameIdx >= 0) {\\n                    list.splice(sameIdx, 1);                 // BC-25 持續：消耗一筆，item 不動\\n                    hasSurvivor = true;                      // 連續顯示者，被搬動會被察覺 → 需 ghost 撐位\\n                } else {\\n                    const nb = list.shift()!;                // BC-23/BC-24 退場再進場（有 In 動畫遮蓋，不算 survivor）\\n                    if (item) item.PlayOut().then(() => { item.SetWantedPosterData(nb); item.PlayIn(); });\\n                    this.m_currentBounty[i] = nb;\\n                }\\n                if (list.length === 0) pool.delete(bs);\\n            } else {\\n                leavingSlots.push(i);                        // BC-22 離場：ghost/gone 待收尾決策\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        // Pass A 收尾：依 hasSurvivor 對離場者統一決策（ghost 撐位 vs 真消失）\\n        for (const i of leavingSlots) {\\n            const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n            this.m_currentBounty[i] = null;\\n            if (hasSurvivor) {\\n                // BC-G1 轉 ghost：item root 維持 active 撐住 Layout 版位，讓 BC-25 持續者不 snap\\n                if (item) {\\n                    item.ClearBaseSymbol();\\n                    outPromises.push(item.PlayOut().then(() => { item.SetContentVisible(false); }));\\n                }\\n            } else {\\n                // 真消失：無連續 survivor 需保護\\n                if (item) outPromises.push(item.PlayOut().then(() => { item.node.active = false; }));\\n                vacatingSlots.push(i);\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        // Pass B：pool 剩餘 = 需進場的新 BaseSymbol [BC-21]\\n        const remaining: IBountyData[] = [];\\n        for (const list of pool.values()) remaining.push(...list);\\n        for (const nb of remaining) {\\n            if (preFreeSlots.length > 0) {\\n                this.EnterAt(preFreeSlots.shift()!, nb);     // 有現成空位/pre-existing ghost → 立即 reuse 進場\\n            } else {\\n                deferredEnter.push(nb);                      // 無現成空位 → 等退場者騰出\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        // 收尾：deferredEnter 等退場騰位 + postReal===0 釋放殘留 ghost（§5.3.1）\\n        // NormalizeGhosts 只釋放「active 且綁定 null」者；先 enter 後 normalize，EnterAt 已填綁定的格不受影響\\n        const needReleaseLingering = !this.m_currentBounty.some(b => b !== null);\\n        if (deferredEnter.length > 0 || needReleaseLingering) {\\n            Promise.all(outPromises).then(() => {\\n                for (const nb of deferredEnter) {\\n                    const idx = vacatingSlots.shift();\\n                    if (idx === undefined) break;            // 理論上不會（已截斷至 count）\\n                    this.EnterAt(idx, nb);\\n                }\\n                if (needReleaseLingering) this.NormalizeGhosts();\\n            });\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 在指定 item 版位進場：設資料、active、PlayIn 並記錄綁定*/\\n    private EnterAt(index: number, data: IBountyData) {\\n        const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[index];\\n        if (!item) return;\\n        // 先 active 再 ShowContent 再 setSkin：reuse ghost 格時 Content 仍 off，須先開可見，\\n        // 否則 inactive 狀態下 setSkin 不會重建已渲染骨架的 render data（殘留舊 skin）\\n        item.node.active = true;\\n        item.SetContentVisible(true);\\n        item.SetWantedPosterData(data);\\n        item.PlayIn();\\n        this.m_currentBounty[index] = data;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 釋放所有 ghost（node.active 但綁定為 null）→ 還原為真消失 + Content 預設可見。\\n     * 用於：RebuildAll / HandleGameIntroComplete 起手（整批前清殘留，使 node.active 判定不被 ghost 干擾）、\\n     *       ReconcileCascade / HandlePlayMarkActive 退到全空時（避免上一輪保留的 ghost 隱形殘留 · BC-G4）。\\n     */\\n    private NormalizeGhosts() {\\n        for (let i = 0; i < this.m_wantedPosterItems.length; i++) {\\n            const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n            if (item && item.node.active && this.m_currentBounty[i] === null) {\\n                item.node.active = false;\\n                item.SetContentVisible(true);   // 還原 Content 預設態，供下次進場\\n                item.ClearBaseSymbol();\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 確保綁定追蹤陣列長度與 item 數一致（初次/變動時補 null、保留既有）*/\\n    private EnsureCurrentBountySize() {\\n        const count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n        if (this.m_currentBounty.length === count) return;\\n        const next: (IBountyData | null)[] = new Array(count).fill(null);\\n        const keep = Math.min(this.m_currentBounty.length, count);\\n        for (let i = 0; i < keep; i++) next[i] = this.m_currentBounty[i];\\n        this.m_currentBounty = next;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依 BaseSymbol 取得**所有**相符的 active 常駐 item（內部用，PLAY_MARK / PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE 路徑）\\n     * 同一盤面允許多筆同 BaseSymbol bounty（各自設到不同 index 的 item），故回陣列而非單一\\n     */\\n    private GetItemsByBaseSymbol(baseSymbol: number): WantedPosterItem[] {\\n        if (baseSymbol === null || baseSymbol === undefined) return [];\\n        const result: WantedPosterItem[] = [];\\n        for (let i = 0; i < this.m_wantedPosterItems.length; i++) {\\n            const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n            const cur = this.m_currentBounty[i];\\n            // 用 m_currentBounty 判斷「正在顯示真懸賞令」，排除 ghost（node.active 但綁定為 null）\\n            // — ghost 的 GetBaseSymbol() 已 ClearBaseSymbol 為 MAX，但以綁定為準更直接（BC-G5）\\n            if (item && item.node.active && cur !== null && cur.BaseSymbol === baseSymbol) {\\n                result.push(item);\\n            }\\n        }\\n        return result;\\n    }\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置懸賞令 UI 顯示狀態\\n     * @param isShow 是否顯示\\n     */\\n    private SetWantedPosterUIShow(isShow: boolean) {\\n        if (!this.m_rootNode) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] SetWantedPosterUIShow: 根節點未設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.m_rootNode.active = isShow;\\n    }\\n    //#endregion Methods\\n\\n    //#region 測試功能\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 測試按鍵處理\\n     * - 數字鍵 1：顯示 1 個懸賞令\\n     * - 數字鍵 2：顯示 2 個懸賞令\\n     * - 數字鍵 3：顯示 UI\\n     * - 數字鍵 4：隱藏 UI\\n     */\\n    private CheckTestKeyCode(event: EventKeyboard): void {\\n        if (!DEBUG) return;\\n        switch (event.keyCode) {\\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_1:\\n                // 測試：顯示 1 個懸賞令\\n                this.SetWantedPosterData([\\n                    { BaseSymbol: Symbol.M1, BountySymbol: 0, Multiple: 2, MultipleIndex: 0 },\\n                ], true);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_2:\\n                // 測試：顯示 2 個懸賞令\\n                this.SetWantedPosterData([\\n                    { BaseSymbol: Symbol.M4, BountySymbol: 0, Multiple: 256, MultipleIndex: 0 },\\n                    { BaseSymbol: Symbol.M8, BountySymbol: 0, Multiple: 9999, MultipleIndex: 1 },\\n                ], true);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_3:\\n                // 測試：顯示 UI\\n                this.SetWantedPosterUIShow(true);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_4:\\n                // 測試：隱藏 UI\\n                this.SetWantedPosterUIShow(false);\\n                break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 測試功能\\n}\\n\\n\",\"structuredPatch\":[{\"oldStart\":57,\"oldLines\":6,\"newStart\":57,\"newLines\":13,\"lines\":[\"      * @ch 遊戲介紹完成後顯示懸賞令x9999\",\"      */\",\"     GAME_INTRO_COMPLETE: \\\"WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_GAME_INTRO_COMPLETE\\\",\",\"+\",\"+    /**\",\"+     * @ch 全部懸賞令早退場（新一局舊盤掉出時觸發，讓懸賞令與舊盤同步離場）\",\"+     * 對所有 active item 播 Out → active=false；同步清空綁定。\",\"+     * 之後 SetNowRoundInfo 的 RebuildAll 因 item 已 active=false，PlayOut 迴圈自然 no-op，只跑新的 PlayIn。\",\"+     */\",\"+    PLAY_OUT_ALL: \\\"WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_PLAY_OUT_ALL\\\",\",\" }\",\" \",\" /**@ch 懸賞令管理器*/\"]}],\"userModified\":false,\"replaceAll\":false}"</outcome>

GAME_EVENT.DEVICE_ROTATION,\",\"originalFile\":\"import { _decorator, Component, Enum, EventKeyboard, Input, input, KeyCode, Layout, log, Node, warn } from 'cc';\\nimport { DEBUG } from 'cc/env';\\nimport { eventManager } from 'db://astarte-framework/Managers';\\nimport { Common } from '../Common/Common';\\nimport { Symbol, IBountyData, GAME_EVENT } from '../Game_Define';\\nimport { WantedPosterItem } from './WantedPosterItem';\\nconst { ccclass, property } = _decorator;\\n\\n/**@ch 懸賞令排版方向設定（直/橫各一組）*/\\n@ccclass('WantedPosterLayoutConfig')\\nclass WantedPosterLayoutConfig {\\n    @property({ type: Enum(Layout.Type), tooltip: \\\"排版類型\\\" })\\n    type = Layout.Type.VERTICAL;\\n\\n    @property({ type: Enum(Layout.ResizeMode), tooltip: \\\"縮放模式\\\" })\\n    resizeMode = Layout.ResizeMode.NONE;\\n\\n    @property({ tooltip: \\\"左內距\\\" }) paddingLeft: number = 0;\\n    @property({ tooltip: \\\"右內距\\\" }) paddingRight: number = 0;\\n    @property({ tooltip: \\\"上內距\\\" }) paddingTop: number = 0;\\n    @property({ tooltip: \\\"下內距\\\" }) paddingBottom: number = 0;\\n    @property({ tooltip: \\\"水平間距\\\" }) spacingX: number = 0;\\n    @property({ tooltip: \\\"垂直間距\\\" }) spacingY: number = 0;\\n    @property({ tooltip: \\\"水平對齊（GRID 模式有效）\\\" }) alignHorizontal: boolean = false;\\n    @property({ tooltip: \\\"垂直對齊（GRID 模式有效）\\\" }) alignVertical: boolean = false;\\n}\\n\\n/**@ch 懸賞令管理器事件*/\\nexport const WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT = {\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置懸賞令資料\\n     * @param IBountyData[] 懸賞令資料陣列\\n     */\\n    SET_WANTED_POSTER_DATA:    if (this.ValidateSetWantedPosterDataArgs(args)) {\\n                    this.SetWantedPosterData(\\n                        args[0] as IBountyData[],\\n                        args[1] === true,\\n                        Array.isArray(args[2]) ? args[2] as number[] : undefined\\n                    );\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case             }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.PLAY_MARK:\\n                this.HandlePlayMark(args[0] as number, args[1] as () => void);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE:\\n                this.HandlePlayMarkActive(args[0] as number, args[1] as () => void);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.GAME_INTRO_COMPLETE:\\n                this.HandleGameIntroComplete();\\n                break;\\n\\n            case GAME_EVENT.DEVICE_ROTATION:\\n cfg.alignVertical;\\n        this.m_layout.updateLayout();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理 PLAY_MARK 事件\\n     * BC-4：對該 BaseSymbol 的所有相符常駐 item 同時播 Mark，全部完成才 resolve\\n     *       （找到 N 個就播 N number, resolve: () => void) {\\n        if (typeof resolve !== 'function') {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] PLAY_MARK: resolve callback 缺失');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const items = this.GetItemsByBaseSymbol(baseSymbol);\\n        if (items.length === 0) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] PLAY_MARK: 找不到對應 item, baseSymbol=', baseSymbol);\\n            resolve();\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        Promise.all(items.map(item => item.PlayMark())).then(() => resolve());\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理 PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE 事件\\n     * BC-6：對該        return;\\n        }\\n        const items = this.GetItemsByBaseSymbol(baseSymbol);\\n        if (items.length === 0) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE: 找不到對應 item, baseSymbol=', baseSymbol);\\n            resolve();\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ── 同步段（Promise.all 之前）：先清本批綁定。並行的其他 dispatch（WantedPosterState 跨 group）\\n        //    也各自同步清，故動畫完成時的 ghost 判定能看到「本波所有離場者皆已退」（§5.5 race 修正）\\n        for (const item of items) {\\n            const idx = this.m_wantedPosterItems.indexOf(item);\\n            if (idx >= 0)          if (!this.m_currentBounty.some(b => b !== null)) this.NormalizeGhosts();\\n            resolve();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理 GAME_INTRO_COMPLETE 事件\\n     * 遊戲介紹完成後顯示 HandleGameIntroComplete() {\\n        // Wanted_On 幀事件偏早 + 改走 ShowInSettled（瞬間定位、不播進場）少了原進場的時間差 → 懸賞令早出現約 0.15 秒。\\n        // ⚠️ 暫時方案：時序真相本應落在 spine 的 Wanted_On keyframe；待能改 spine 原檔後移除此延遲。\\n        // 延遲綁在 WantedPosterManager（持久 UI 管理器，node 全程 active），而非 sender GameIntroManager\\n        //（其 node 於 intro 結束 active=false，scheduleOnce 會被取消導致懸賞令不顯示）。\\n        this.scheduleOnce(() => this.ShowGameIntroPoster(), WantedPosterManager.GAME_INTRO_SHOW_DELAY);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 實際顯示 GAME_INTRO_COMPLETE 懸賞令 x9999（由 HandleGameIntroComplete 延遲呼叫）\\n     * 前提：呼叫時場上保證為空（開場第一次顯示），故直接設定 item[0]、不需清場。\\n     * Multiple=9999 ≥ Multiplier_Max → item 內部走 m_x9999Node 顯示分支。\\n     */\\n    private ShowGameIntroPoster() {\\n        this.EnsureCurrentBountySize();\\n        this.NormalizeGhosts();   // 防禦：0→1 前確保無殘留 ghost（正常此路徑場上為空）\\n        const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[0];\\n        if (!item) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] GAME_INTRO_COMPLETE: 懸賞令物品[0] 未設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const data: IBountyData = { BaseSymbol: Symbol.M1, BountySymbol: 0, Multiple: 9999, MultipleIndex: 0 };\\n        // 先 active 再 setSkin：inactive 狀態下 setSkin 不會重建已渲染骨架的 render data（殘留舊 skin）\\n        item.node.active = true;\\n        item.SetWantedPosterData(data);\\n        item.ShowInSettled();           // 直接顯示 In 定位完成的靜止畫面（不播進場）\\n        this.m_currentBounty[0] = data;\\n    }\\n    //#endregion Event Management\\n\\n    //#region Methods\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置懸賞令資料（以 BaseSymbol multiset 比對前後狀態 — 決定 進場 / 退場 / 退場再進場 / 持續）\\n     *\\n     * 比對規則（內容式，計數 multiset；每個 BaseSymbol 綁定一個 item，持續者保留原綁定）：\\n     * - BC-20 isNewRound=true（新一局）→ 現有全部退場、新清單全部進場（整批重建）\\n     * - BC-21 同局・新增 BaseSymbol（計數增加）→ 進場（SetData + active + PlayIn）\\n     * - BC-22 同局・移除 BaseSymbol（計數減少）→ 退場（PlayOut → active=false）\\n     * - BC-23 同局・同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 變 → 原 item 盤面(扣除被消除位置)目前可見的 BaseSymbol；僅 cascade 需傳，省略視為全可見\\n     */\\n    private SetWantedPosterData(dataList: IBountyData[], isNewRound: boolean = false, visibleBaseSymbols?: number[]) {\\n        if (!this.m_wantedPosterItems || this.m_wantedPosterItems.length === 0) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] SetWantedPosterData: 懸賞令物品未設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.EnsureCurrentBountySize();\\n\\n        const count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n        // 本輪要顯示的 bounty（Multiple>0 且 BaseSymbol 非 Wanted_Empty 佔位），超量截斷至 item 數量上限\\n        // BaseSymbol === Wanted_Empty 視同空資料（懸賞海報空位），一併排除不顯示\\n        const newBounties = dataList.filter(d => d && d.Multiple > 0 && d.BaseSymbol !== Symbol.Wanted_Empty);\\n        if (newBounties.length > count) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] SetWantedPosterData: 資料數量超過物品數量',\\n                newBounties.length, '>', count);\\n            newBounties.length = count;\\n        }\\n\\n        if (isNewRound) {\\n            this.RebuildAll(newBounties);\\n        } else {\\n            this.ReconcileCascade(newBounties, visibleBaseSymbols);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch BC-20 整批重建（新一局）：現有全部 Out 並關閉，全部 Out 完成後新清單依序設資料、active、PlayIn。\\n     *     先 Out 再一起 In，避免新舊同時在場造成 Layout 重排跳動。\\n     *     綁定同步記錄為目標狀態（視覺在 Out 完成後才 In）。\\n     */\\n    private RebuildAll(newBounties: IBountyData[]) {\\n        // 整批重建前先釋放殘留 ghost：使下方以 node.active 判退場的迴圈不被 ghost（active 但隱形）干擾（BC-G4 · D5）\\n        this.NormalizeGhosts();\\n        const count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n\\n        const outPromises: Promise<void>[] = [];\\n        for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {\\n            const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n            if (item && item.node.active) {\\n                outPromises.push(item.PlayOut().then(() => { item.node.active = false; }));\\n            }\\n            // 同步記錄目標綁定（前 newBounties.length 個為新資料，其餘清空）\\n            this.m_currentBounty[i] = i < newBounties.length ? newBounties[i] : null;\\n        }\\n\\n        const enterAll = () => {\\n            for (let i = 0; i < newBounties.length; i++) {\\n                const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n                if (!item) continue;\\n                // 先 active 再 ShowContent 再 setSkin：inactive/Content off 時 setSkin 不重建 render data（殘留舊 skin）\\n                item.node.active = true;\\n                item.SetContentVisible(true);\\n                item.SetWantedPosterData(newBounties[i]);\\n                item.PlayIn();\\n            }\\n        };\\n\\n        if (outPromises.length > 0) Promise.all(outPromises).then(enterAll);\\n        else enterAll();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 同局 cascade 對帳：以 BaseSymbol multiset 比對目前綁定 ↔ 新清單，保留持續者的 item 綁定。\\n     *     - 同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 同・盤面仍可見 → 持續（不動）         [BC-25]\\n     *     - 同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 變 或 盤面已無此符號 → 原 item 退場再進場 [BC-23/BC-24]\\n     *     - 多出的新 BaseSymbol → 進場（優先用原本就空的 item；不足才等退場者騰出版位）[BC-21]\\n     *     - 少掉的舊 BaseSymbol → 退場                                  [BC-22]\\n     * @param visibleBaseSymbols 盤面(扣除被消除位置)可見的 BaseSymbol；省略視為全可見\\n     */\\n    private ReconcileCascade(newBounties: IBountyData[], visibleBaseSymbols?: number[]) {\\n        const count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n        const visible = visibleBaseSymbols ? new Set(visibleBaseSymbols) : null;\\n\\n        // 新清單依 BaseSymbol 分組成可消耗的 pool（multiset）\\n        const pool = new Map<number, IBountyData[]>();\\n        for (const b of newBounties) {\\n            const list = pool.get(b.BaseSymbol);\\n            if (list) list.push(b); else pool.set(b.BaseSymbol, [b]);\\n        }\\n\\n        const preFreeSlots: number[] = [];      // 更新前就空著的 item（含 pre-existing ghost），供進場立即 reuse\\n        const vacatingSlots: number[] = [];     // 本輪「真消失」騰出的 item，Out 完才可用\\n        const outPromises: Promise<void>[] = [];\\n        const deferredEnter: IBountyData[] = [];\\n        const leavingSlots: number[] = [];      // BC-22 離場者：ghost vs 真消失待 Pass A 後依 hasSurvivor 決定\\n        let hasSurvivor = false;                // 任一 BC-25 持續者（全程沒播 Out/In）→ 需 ghost 撐位防 snap\\n\\n        // Pass A：逐一決定目前已綁定 item 的命運（BC-22 離場決策延後到收尾）\\n        for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {\\n            const cur = this.m_currentBounty[i];\\n            const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n            if (cur === null) {\\n                if (item) preFreeSlots.push(i);              // 空格或 pre-existing content.thinking:
The user is now starting the actual implementation. Looking at this Edit operation:

1. **What happened**: Added a new event constant `PLAY_OUT_ALL` to the `WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT` object in WantedPosterManager.ts
2. **The change**: Added documentation and event string for triggering early exit of all wanted posters when slot reels drop out
3. **Purpose**: This is the first step in implementing the synchronized exit animation - defining the event that will be dispatched from SlotReels.TriggerDropOut()

This is a concrete implementation step - adding the event constant that will be used to trigger the poster exit animations. The comment clearly explains:
- It's triggered when new round's old reels drop out
- It makes all active items play Out animation and set active=false
- It synchronously clears bindings
- After this, SetNowRoundInfo's RebuildAll will skip PlayOut loop (items already inactive) and only run new PlayIn

This is the first of the 3 planned changes mentioned in the design.

content.text:
```xml
<observation>
  <type>feature</type>
  <title>Added PLAY_OUT_ALL Event for Wanted Poster Exit Synchronization</title>
  <subtitle>New event constant enables synchronized exit of all wanted posters with slot reel drop-out animation</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.PLAY_OUT_ALL constant added with value "WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_PLAY_OUT_ALL"</fact>
    <fact>Event triggers all active wanted poster items to play Out animation and set active=false</fact>
    <fact>Event synchronously clears poster bindings (m_currentBounty array) during exit</fact>
    <fact>After poster exit, RebuildAll in SetNowRoundInfo skips PlayOut loop since items are already inactive</fact>
    <fact>Event designed to be dispatched from SlotReels.TriggerDropOut() to synchronize poster exit with reel drop-out timing</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Implemented the first component of the wanted poster exit synchronization feature by adding the PLAY_OUT_ALL event constant to WantedPosterManager. This event will be dispatched when a new spin round begins and old reels trigger their drop-out animation, ensuring wanted posters exit in sync with the departing slot symbols. The event is designed to trigger early exit of all active posters - playing Out animations and deactivating them - before the normal RebuildAll flow runs. By clearing poster bindings synchronously and deactivating items during exit, the subsequent RebuildAll naturally skips the PlayOut loop (since items are already inactive) and only executes new PlayIn animations for incoming posters. This maintains consistency with normal spin behavior where posters unshow early rather than late.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
  </files_read>

    <file>assets/Script/WantedPoster/WantedPosterManager.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>
```

  <narrative>Completed the event infrastructure for PLAY_OUT_ALL by registering it with the event manager and routing it through the OnEvent dispatcher to the HandlePlayOutAll() handler. The registration follows WantedPosterManager's established pattern where events are declared in EVENTS_TO_REGISTER array, automatically registered during onLoad lifecycle, and dispatched through the OnEvent method's switch statement. This infrastructure allows SlotReels to dispatch PLAY_OUT_ALL events that will be received by WantedPosterManager. The next implementation step is to write the HandlePlayOutAll() method body that will iterate through all active poster items, trigger PlayOut animations, clear bindings synchronously, and deactivate items - ensuring posters exit in sync with the reel drop-out animation.</narrative>

事件參數\\n     * @param args 事件參數\\n     * @returns 是否有效\\n     */\\n    private ValidateSetWantedPosterUIShowArgs(args: any[]): boolean {\\n        if (typeof args[0] !== 'boolean') {\\n 事件參數\\n     * @param args 事件參數\\n     * @returns 是否有效\\n     */\\n    private ValidateSetWantedPosterDataArgs(args: any[]): boolean {\\n        if (!Array.isArray(args[0])) {\\n    if (this.ValidateSetWantedPosterDataArgs(args)) {\\n                    this.SetWantedPosterData(\\n                        args[0] as IBountyData[],\\n                        args[1] === true,\\n             }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.PLAY_MARK:\\n                this.HandlePlayMark(args[0] as number, args[1] as () => void);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE:\\n                this.HandlePlayMarkActive(args[0] as number, args[1] as () => void);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.GAME_INTRO_COMPLETE:\\n                this.HandleGameIntroComplete();\\n                break;\\n\\n            case WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.PLAY_OUT_ALL:\\n                this.HandlePlayOutAll();\\n                break;\\n\\n            case GAME_EVENT.DEVICE_ROTATION:\\n                this.ApplyLayoutByOrientation();\\n                break;\\n\\n            default:\\n                warn('[WantedPosterManager] OnEvent: 未知的事件', event);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依目前裝置方向套用對應的 Layout 設定\\n     * 由 start() 與 未設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const isLandscape = Common.GetGameView().IsLandscape;\\n        const cfg = isLandscape ? this.m_landscapeConfig : this.m_portraitConfig;\\n\\n        this.m_layout.type = cfg.type;\\n        this.m_layout.resizeMode = cfg.resizeMode;\\n        this.m_layout.paddingLeft = cfg.paddingLeft;\\n        this.m_layout.paddingRight = cfg.paddingRight;\\n        this.m_layout.paddingTop = cfg.paddingTop;\\n        this.m_layout.paddingBottom = cfg.paddingBottom;\\n        this.m_layout.spacingX = cfg.spacingX;\\n        this.m_layout.spacingY = cfg.spacingY;\\n        this.m_layout.alignHorizontal = cfg.alignHorizontal;\\n        this.m_layout.alignVertical = cfg.alignVertical;\\n        this.m_layout.updateLayout();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] PLAY_MARK: resolve callback 缺失');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const items = this.GetItemsByBaseSymbol(baseSymbol);\\n        if (items.length === 0) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] PLAY_MARK: 找不到對應 item, baseSymbol=', baseSymbol);\\n            resolve();\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        Promise.all(items.map(item => item.PlayMark())).then(() => resolve());\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理 PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE 事件\\n     * BC-6：對該 BaseSymbol 的所有相符 item 同時播 Mark_Active 並各自    if (typeof resolve !== 'function') {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE: resolve callback 缺失');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const items = this.GetItemsByBaseSymbol(baseSymbol);\\n        if (items.length === 0) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE: 找不到對應 item, baseSymbol=', baseSymbol);\\n            resolve();\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ── 同步段（Promise.all 之前）：先清本批綁定。並行的其他 dispatch（WantedPosterState 跨 group）\\n        //    也各自同步清，故動畫完成時的 ghost 判定能看到「本波所有離場者皆已退」（§5.5 race item.ClearBaseSymbol();\\n        }\\n        // ── 非同步段：動畫播完才切換視覺。判定移到 .then（此時全波同步段已執行完）：\\n        //    仍有 real（survivor 留場）→ 轉 ghost 撐位讓 survivor 不 snap；否則真消失（BC-G6）\\n        Promise.all(items.map(item =>\\n            item.PlayMarkActive().then(() => {\\n                if (this.m_currentBounty.some(b => b !== null)) item.SetContentVisible(false);\\n                else item.node.active = false;\\n            })\\n        )).then(() => {\\n            // 本波後若全場無 real → 釋放殘留 ghost（避免上一輪保留的 ghost 隱形殘留 · §5.3.1）\\n            if (!this.m_currentBounty.some(b => b !== null)) this.NormalizeGhosts();\\n            resolve();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理 GAME_INTRO_COMPLETE 事件\\n     * 遊戲介紹完成後顯示 1 個懸賞令（M1、倍率 9999）為「已定位」靜止畫面（不播 In 進場）。\\n     * 前提：呼叫時場上保證為空（開場第一次顯示），故直接設定 item[0]、不需清場。\\n     * Multiple=9999 ≥ Multiplier_Max → item 內部走 m_x9999Node 顯示分支。\\n     */\\n    private HandleGameIntroComplete() {\\n        // Wanted_On 幀事件偏早 + 改走 ShowInSettled（瞬間定位、不播進場）少了原進場的時間差 → 懸賞令早出現約 0.15 秒。\\n        // ⚠️ 暫時方案：時序真相本應落在 spine 的 Wanted_On keyframe；待能改 spine 原檔後移除此延遲。\\n        // 延遲綁在 WantedPosterManager（持久 UI 管理器，node 全程 active），而非 sender GameIntroManager\\n        //（其 node 於 intro 結束 active=false，scheduleOnce 會被取消導致懸賞令不顯示）。\\n        this.scheduleOnce(() => this.ShowGameIntroPoster(), WantedPosterManager.GAME_INTRO_SHOW_DELAY);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 實際顯示 GAME_INTRO_COMPLETE 懸賞令 x9999（由 HandleGameIntroComplete 延遲呼叫）\\n     * 前提：呼叫時場上保證為空（開場第一次顯示），故直接設定 item[0]、不需清場。\\n     * Multiple=9999 ≥ Multiplier_Max → item 內部走 m_x9999Node 顯示分支。\\n     */\\n    private ShowGameIntroPoster() {\\n        this.EnsureCurrentBountySize();\\n        this.NormalizeGhosts();   // 防禦：0→1 前確保無殘留 ghost（正常此路徑場上為空）\\n        const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[0];\\n        if (!item) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] GAME_INTRO_COMPLETE: 懸賞令物品[0] 未設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const data: IBountyData = { BaseSymbol: Symbol.M1, BountySymbol: 0, Multiple: 9999, MultipleIndex: 0 };\\n        // 先 active 再 setSkin：inactive 狀態下 setSkin 不會重建已渲染骨架的 render data（殘留舊 skin）\\n        item.node.active = true;\\n        item.SetWantedPosterData(data);\\n        item.ShowInSettled();           // 直接顯示 In 定位完成的靜止畫面（不播進場）\\n        this.m_currentBounty[0] = data;\\n    }\\n    //#endregion Event Management\\n\\n    //#region Methods\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置懸賞令資料（以 BaseSymbol multiset 比對前後狀態 — 決定 進場 / 退場 / 退場再進場 / 持續）\\n     *\\n     * 比對規則（內容式，計數 multiset；每個 BaseSymbol 綁定一個 item，持續者保留原綁定）：\\n     * - BC-20 isNewRound=true（新一局）→ 現有全部退場、新清單全部進場（整批重建）\\n     * - BC-21 同局・新增 BaseSymbol（計數增加）→ 進場（SetData + active + PlayIn）\\n     * - BC-22 同局・移除 BaseSymbol（計數減少）→ 退場（PlayOut → active=false）\\n     * - BC-23 同局・同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 變 → 原 item 退場再進場（PlayOut → SetData → PlayIn）\\n     * - BC-24 同局・同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 同・盤面(扣除被消除位置)已無此符號 → 原 item 退場再進場\\n     * - BC-25 同局・同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 同・盤面仍可見 → 持續，不播動畫\\n     * 位置重排一律交由 cc.Layout（本元件只處理 In/Out 動畫，不碰節點位置）。\\n     *\\n     * @param dataList 本輪懸賞令資料（Multiple>0 才顯示）\\n     * @param isNewRound 是否新一局（強制整批重建）；省略視為同局 cascade\\n     * @param visibleBaseSymbols 盤面(扣除被消除位置)目前可見的 BaseSymbol；僅 cascade 需傳，省略視為全可見\\n     */\\n    private SetWantedPosterData(dataList: IBountyData[], isNewRound: boolean = false, visibleBaseSymbols?: number[]) {\\n        if (!this.m_wantedPosterItems || this.m_wantedPosterItems.length === 0) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] SetWantedPosterData: 懸賞令物品未設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.EnsureCurrentBountySize();\\n\\n        const count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n        // 本輪要顯示的 bounty（Multiple>0 且 BaseSymbol 非 Wanted_Empty 佔位），超量截斷至 item 數量上限\\n        // BaseSymbol === Wanted_Empty 視同空資料（懸賞海報空位），一併排除不顯示\\n        const newBounties = dataList.filter(d => d && d.Multiple > 0 && d.BaseSymbol !== Symbol.Wanted_Empty);\\n        if (newBounties.length > count) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] SetWantedPosterData: 資料數量超過物品數量',\\n                newBounties.length, '>', count);\\n            newBounties.length = count;\\n        }\\n\\n        if (isNewRound) {\\n            this.RebuildAll(newBounties);\\n        } else {\\n            this.ReconcileCascade(newBounties, visibleBaseSymbols);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch BC-20 整批重建（新一局）：現有全部 Out 並關閉，全部 Out 完成後新清單依序設資料、active、PlayIn。\\n     *     先 Out 再一起 In，避免新舊同時在場造成 Layout 重排跳動。\\n     *     綁定同步記錄為目標狀態（視覺在 Out 完成後才 In）。\\n     */\\n    private RebuildAll(newBounties: IBountyData[]) {\\n        // 整批重建前先釋放殘留 ghost：使下方以 node.active 判退場的迴圈不被 ghost（active 但隱形）干擾（BC-G4 · D5）\\n        this.NormalizeGhosts();\\n        const count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n\\n        const outPromises: Promise<void>[] = [];\\n        for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {\\n            const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n            if (item && item.node.active) {\\n                outPromises.push(item.PlayOut().then(() => { item.node.active = false; }));\\n            }\\n            // 同步記錄目標綁定（前 newBounties.length 個為新資料，其餘清空）\\n            this.m_currentBounty[i] = i < newBounties.length ? newBounties[i] : null;\\n        }\\n\\n        const enterAll = () => {\\n            for (let i = 0; i < newBounties.length; i++) {\\n                const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n                if (!item) continue;\\n                // 先 active 再 ShowContent 再 setSkin：inactive/Content off 時 setSkin 不重建 render data（殘留舊 skin）\\n                item.node.active = true;\\n                item.SetContentVisible(true);\\n                item.SetWantedPosterData(newBounties[i]);\\n                item.PlayIn();\\n            }\\n        };\\n\\n        if (outPromises.length > 0) Promise.all(outPromises).then(enterAll);\\n        else enterAll();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 同局 cascade 對帳：以 BaseSymbol multiset 比對目前綁定 ↔ 新清單，保留持續者的 item 綁定。\\n     *     - 同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 同・盤面仍可見 → 持續（不動）         [BC-25]\\n     *     - 同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 變 或 盤面已無此符號 → 原 item 退場再進場 [BC-23/BC-24]\\n     *     - 多出的新 BaseSymbol → 進場（優先用原本就空的 item；不足才等退場者騰出版位）[BC-21]\\n     *     - 少掉的舊 BaseSymbol → 退場                                  [BC-22]\\n     * @param visibleBaseSymbols 盤面(扣除被消除位置)可見的 BaseSymbol；省略視為全可見\\n     */\\n    private ReconcileCascade(newBounties: IBountyData[], visibleBaseSymbols?: number[]) {\\n        const count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n        const visible = visibleBaseSymbols ? new const list = pool.get(b.BaseSymbol);\\n            if (list) list.push(b); else pool.set(b.BaseSymbol, [b]);\\n        }\\n\\n        const preFreeSlots: number[] = [];      // 更新前就空著的 item（含 content.thinking:
This is the implementation of the HandlePlayOutAll() method. Let me capture what was done:

1. The method HandlePlayOutAll() was implemented
2. It synchronously clears all poster bindings (m_currentBounty[i] = null)
3. It triggers PlayOut animations on all active items
4. After animations complete, it deactivates items, restores content visibility, and clears base symbols
5. It's a fire-and-forget operation (doesn't return a promise or callback)
6. It calls NormalizeGhosts() first to handle any existing ghost items
7. The assumption is that Out animation duration is much shorter than reel drop-out (~1.5s) + big win preview

This completes the WantedPosterManager side of the implementation. The next step should be to dispatch this event from SlotReels.TriggerDropOut().

content.text:
```xml
<observation>
  <type>feature</type>
  <title>Implemented HandlePlayOutAll Method for Synchronized Poster Exit</title>
  <subtitle>Method triggers all active posters to play Out animations and clear state when reels drop out</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>HandlePlayOutAll() synchronously clears all poster bindings by setting m_currentBounty[i] to null before animations start</fact>
    <fact>Method iterates through all active poster items and triggers PlayOut() animation for each</fact>
    <fact>After PlayOut completes, each item is restored to clean state: active=false, SetContentVisible(true), ClearBaseSymbol()</fact>
    <fact>Implementation uses fire-and-forget pattern without promise resolution or callback, allowing parallel execution with reel drop-out</fact>
    <fact>NormalizeGhosts() called at start to convert existing ghost items (active but unbound) to inactive before processing real posters</fact>
    <fact>Method assumes Out animation duration is much shorter than reel drop-out duration (~1.5s) plus big win preview timing</fact>
    <fact>When RebuildAll runs later during SetNowRoundInfo, items are already active=false so PlayOut loop becomes no-op and only PlayIn executes</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Implemented the core logic for synchronized wanted poster exit animations. HandlePlayOutAll() handles the PLAY_OUT_ALL event by first normalizing any ghost items to prevent them from being treated as real posters requiring exit animations. It then synchronously clears all poster bindings in m_currentBounty, ensuring that any concurrent queries (like GetItemsByBaseSymbol) immediately see the field as empty. For each active item, it triggers the PlayOut animation in a fire-and-forget manner - not awaiting completion or blocking the caller. After each animation finishes, the item is restored to a clean state (deactivated, content visible, base symbol cleared) ready for the next round. This design allows poster exit animations to run in parallel with the reel drop-out sequence without blocking game flow. The method relies on the assumption that poster Out animations complete before RebuildAll runs during SetNowRoundInfo, at which point items being already inactive causes the RebuildAll PlayOut loop to skip them naturally and proceed directly to PlayIn for new posters.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
    <concept>problem-solution</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>assets/Script/WantedPoster/WantedPosterManager.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>
